paper.title: MedKGent: A Large Language Model Agent Framework for Constructing Temporally Evolving Medical Knowledge Graph

difficulty.rationale: Extractor agent (triples + sampling-based confidence + low-confidence filter) + Constructor agent (day-by-day temporal integration, noisy-OR reinforcement, polar-conflict resolution); off-the-shelf prompted LLM, deterministic mock, no GPU/finetuning
